name: Aatrox

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Deathbringer Stance
passive.description_source: Innate: Periodically,  Aatrox's next  basic attack deals bonus magic damage based on the target's maximum health,  healing him for the damage dealt.

effects.description: Innate: Periodically, Aatrox empowers his next basic attack to gain 50 bonus range and deal bonus magic damage equal to 4% : 10.71% (based on level) of the target's maximum health, capped at 100 : 345.88 (based on level) against monsters. Deathbringer Stance's damage applies life steal.Aatrox heals for the post-mitigation bonus damage dealt, reduced to 25% against minions.

Whenever Aatrox hits at least one enemy champion or large monster with a basic attack on-hit or an ability, Deathbringer Stance's current cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds, doubled to 4 if he hits with the Sweetspot of The Darkin Blade.

passive.description: Innate: Periodically, Aatrox empowers his next basic attack to gain 50 bonus range and deal bonus magic damage equal to 4% : 10.71% (based on level) of the target's maximum health, capped at 100 : 345.88 (based on level) against monsters. Deathbringer Stance's damage applies life steal.Aatrox heals for the post-mitigation bonus damage dealt, reduced to 25% against minions.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Aatrox will assume stance when an enemy champion is in range of Infernal Chains.

basic_ability_1.name: The Darkin Blade

effects.description: Aatrox can activate The Darkin Blade three times before the ability goes on cooldown, with a 1-second static cooldown between casts. If Aatrox does not recast the ability within 4 seconds of the previous cast, it goes on cooldown.

Active: Aatrox performs a strike with his greatsword for each of the three casts, dealing physical damage to enemies hit within an area. Enemies hit within a Sweetspot of the area take 70% bonus damage and are also knocked up for 0.25 seconds. Each subsequent cast gains 25% more damage.

effects.context_notes: First Cast: Aatrox's first strike affects a 625 × 180-unit rectangular area in the target direction, with him centered on the back line and the Sweetspot at the farthest edge.
First Cast: Aatrox's first strike affects a 625 × 180-unit rectangular area in the target direction, with him centered on the back line and the Sweetspot at the farthest edge.
Second Cast: Aatrox's second strike affects a trapezoidal area in the target direction, with the Sweetspot at the farthest edge.
Second Cast: Aatrox's second strike affects a trapezoidal area in the target direction, with the Sweetspot at the farthest edge.
Third Cast: Aatrox's third strike affects a 300-radius circular area centered on a target location that is 200 units in front of him, with a 180-radius Sweetspot within.
Third Cast: Aatrox's third strike affects a 300-radius circular area centered on a target location that is 200 units in front of him, with a 180-radius Sweetspot within.
The Darkin Blade deals 55% / 60% / 65% / 70% (based on level) damage against minions.
The Darkin Blade deals 55% / 60% / 65% / 70% (based on level) damage against minions.

basic_ability_1.description: Aatrox can activate The Darkin Blade three times before the ability goes on cooldown, with a 1-second static cooldown between casts. If Aatrox does not recast the ability within 4 seconds of the previous cast, it goes on cooldown.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The highlighted areas denote the sweetspot - enemies are affected where the two areas overlap (See edge range and center range).
basic_ability_1.description_source: Aatrox can activate The Darkin Blade three times before the ability goes on cooldown, with a 1-second static cooldown between casts. If Aatrox does not recast the ability within 4 seconds of the previous cast, it goes on cooldown.

basic_ability_2.name: Infernal Chains
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that deals physical damage and  slows the first enemy hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that damages the first enemy hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds, with increased minion damage.
Active: Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that damages the first enemy hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds, with increased minion damage.
Active: Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that damages the first enemy hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds, with increased minion damage.

effects.description: If this hits an enemy champion or large monster, a tether is formed between the target and the ground beneath them for 1.5 seconds, during which they are revealed.

effects.context_notes: If the tether is not broken by the end of its duration, the target is dealt the same physical damage again and pulled to the center of the area.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Aatrox sends a chain in the target direction that deals physical damage to the first enemy hit, doubled against minions, and slowing them for 1.5 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The impact area is oriented relative to Aatrox's position when the projectile hits, not where the projectile originated from.

basic_ability_3.name: Umbral Dash
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive:  Aatrox  heals for the portion of the damage he deals to champions.

effects.description: Passive: Aatrox heals for 16% (+ 1.1% per 100 bonus health) of non- persistent post-mitigation damage he deals against enemy champions.
Active: Aatrox dashes in the target direction.
Umbral Dash resets Aatrox's basic attack timer and can be cast during his other abilities without cancelling them and vice versa.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Aatrox heals for 16% (+ 1.1% per 100 bonus health) of non- persistent post-mitigation damage he deals against enemy champions.
context_notes: Source speed: 800 / up to 1340 units per second.
Source notes (summary): The dash distance can be extended to up-to 500 units when targeting across terrain.

ultimate.name: World Ender
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Aatrox unleashes his true form for a period, gaining a burst of  move speed. During this time, Aatrox has increased  attack damage,  self-healing, and is  ghosted.

effects.context_notes: Active: Aatrox unleashes his true form for 10 seconds, fearing nearby enemy minions and monsters for 3 seconds, during which they are gradually slowed by up to 99% over the duration.

effects.description: Whenever Aatrox scores a champion takedown, he extends the duration by 5 seconds, up to its original length, and becomes unleashed again.

effects.context_notes: During World Ender, Aatrox gains bonus attack damage, has 5% increased size, is ghosted, and receives increased self-healing from all sources.
During World Ender, Aatrox gains bonus attack damage, has 5% increased size, is ghosted, and receives increased self-healing from all sources.

effects.description: Aatrox can move during World Ender's cast time.

ultimate.description: Active: Aatrox unleashes his true form for 10 seconds, fearing nearby enemy minions and monsters for 3 seconds, during which they are gradually slowed by up to 99% over the duration. He also gains bonus movement speed that decays by 10% of the current bonus every 0.25 seconds, lasting until World Ender has ended.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): His resource bar indicates the remaining duration of World Ender.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
